zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Ros, Knt.於大約1370年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯托克 阿爾班尼時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt35歲，母親Beatrice Stafford31歲。他於1394年10月9日與Margaret FitzAlan在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年9月1日在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素享年45歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Ros, Knt.于大约1370年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯托克 阿爾班尼时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt35岁，母亲Beatrice Stafford31岁。他于1394年10月9日与Margaret FitzAlan在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年9月1日在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素享年45岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Ros, Knt. was born about 1370, in Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt, was 35 and his mother, Beatrice Stafford, was 31. He married Margaret FitzAlan on 9 October 1394, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 September 1414, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Ros, Knt. est né environ 1370, à Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Stafford, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret FitzAlan le 9 octobre 1394, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1414, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Ros, Knt. um 1370 in Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt 35 und seine Mutter Beatrice Stafford 31. Er hat am 9. Oktober 1394 in Leicestershire, England Margaret FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1414 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Ros, Knt. è nato il circa 1370 nel Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Stafford, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret FitzAlan il 9 ottobre 1394, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1414, nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Ros, Knt.が約1370年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアストク アルバニーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Ros, Kntは35歳，母Beatrice Staffordは31歳であった。1394年10月9日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでMargaret FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年9月1日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで45歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Ros, Knt.(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스토크 알바니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Stafford(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1394년 10월 9일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Margaret FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 9월 1일 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에 묻혔다.

mn.Radwinter, Uttlesford, Essex, England: Radwinter, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Ros, Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Stafford, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret FitzAlan em 9 de outubro de 1394, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1414, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Ros, Knt. родился около 1370 г. в местности сток албани, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Stafford, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret FitzAlan 9 октября 1394 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1414 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Ros, Knt. nació aproximadamente 1370, en Stoke Albany, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Ros, Knt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Beatrice Stafford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret FitzAlan el 9 de octubre de 1394, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1414, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
